task_completion.description: The gs-maven-broken project is imported into Eclipse
task_completion.visual_evidence: Eclipse IDE is open and 'gs-maven-broken' is visible in the Project Explorer or Package Explorer view.

task_completion.description: The missing dependency compilation errors are identified
task_completion.visual_evidence: Eclipse editor showing HelloWorld.java with red error indicators on the 'org.joda.time.LocalTime' import, or the Problems view listing errors related to missing joda-time/LocalTime.

task_completion.description: The pom.xml file is opened for editing
task_completion.visual_evidence: The pom.xml file of the gs-maven-broken project is open in the Eclipse editor area.

task_completion.description: The joda-time dependency is added to pom.xml
task_completion.visual_evidence: The pom.xml file in the editor clearly shows a <dependency> block added for groupId 'joda-time', artifactId 'joda-time', and version '2.12.5'.

task_completion.description: The project builds successfully without errors
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eclipse Problems view shows 0 errors for the project (red 'x' icons are gone), or the Eclipse Console view shows a successful Maven build ('BUILD SUCCESS').

integrity.description: The agent used Eclipse to edit the project files
integrity.visual_evidence: Modifications to pom.xml and project inspection are performed within the Eclipse IDE GUI, not exclusively via terminal text editors like nano or vim.

integrity.description: The agent modified the correct broken project
integrity.visual_evidence: The project being edited in Eclipse is named 'gs-maven-broken' and corresponds to the ~/eclipse-workspace/gs-maven-broken directory, not a newly created project.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass Eclipse to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent actually imported the project into Eclipse as instructed, rather than just running 'mvn clean install' and editing files entirely from the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/gs-maven-broken. The missing dependency that must be added to pom.xml is 'joda-time' with version '2.12.5'. The compilation error originates from HelloWorld.java importing org.joda.time.LocalTime.
